description: You are an Information Security Analyst doing incident response. A junior analyst drafted a decryption script (`decryptor.py`) for the CryptLocker-26 ransomware, but it is crashing and corrupting files. Decrypt all files in `infected_drive/` by fixing the cryptographic and logical bugs in `decryptor.py` using the recovered master password 'admin123' and the `ransomware_spec.md`.
